description: Write a run summary containing XSS payloads (<script>, <iframe>, javascript:) to .forge/runs/run-xss/summary.json; verify the payload is stored safely as JSON data (not executed), and that escapeHtml strips all dangerous patterns before rendering.

setup.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); const d=p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge','runs','run-xss'); fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true}); const payload='

execute.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); const s=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge','runs','run-xss','summary.json'),'utf-8')); if(typeof global.__pwned!=='undefined')throw new Error('XSS executed in Node context'); const msg=s.message; if(!msg.includes('script'))throw new Error('payload not stored correctly'); const escapeHtml=str=>String(str).replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/\"/g,'"'); const escaped=escapeHtml(msg); if(escaped.includes('<script'))throw new Error('escapeHtml failed: script tag present after escape'); if(escaped.includes('<iframe'))throw new Error('escapeHtml failed: iframe tag present after escape'); if(escaped.includes('javascript:'))throw new Error('escapeHtml failed: javascript: url present after escape'); if(!escaped.includes('<'))throw new Error('escapeHtml must convert < to <'); console.log('ok XSS: payload stored as data, escapeHtml produces clean output, window.__pwned undefined');"
